title: Less Leaf Litter
description: Leaf Litter now has a 12.5% chance of dropping
body:
# Less Leaf Litter

Too much clutter from leaf litter? This mod **reduces leaf litter drop rates** to match the balanced feel of vanilla grass seed drops — without removing the mechanic entirely.

Now your forests stay clean, and gameplay stays fair.

## Features:

- Reduces **leaf litter drop chance** to **12.5**%, same as grass seeds

- Works even when multiple litter items are present on one block:

  - For example, **3 pieces** of leaf litter → **12.5**% **chance** to drop **all 3**

- Breaking leaf litter with **shears** still yields the **full normal drop**, guaranteed

## Compatibility:

- **Mod**: Minecraft **1.21.5 - 1.21.11**

- **Datapack**: Minecraft **1.21.5 - 1.21.11**

- No dependencies needed
